languages.text: "Потому что предлагаемая вами гипотеза вызывает у меня ощущение полной потери в пространстве, физическом и информационном".

traits.locale_text: "Потому что предлагаемая вами гипотеза вызывает у единицы экзистенциальный ужас".

languages.text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."
languages.original_text: "Потому что предлагаемая вами гипотеза вызывает у меня ощущение полной потери в пространстве, физическом и информационном".

traits.locale_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."
"Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."
"Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

languages.text: “因为你提出的假设让我感觉自己仿佛在物理与信息层面都迷失于虚空之中。”
languages.original_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

traits.locale_text: “因为你提出的假设让我感觉自己仿佛在物理与信息层面都迷失于虚空之中。”

languages.text: « Parce que l'hypothèse que vous avancez me donne la sensation d'être totalement perdu dans l'espace, d'un point de vue physique aussi bien qu'informationnel. »
languages.original_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

traits.locale_text: « Parce que l'hypothèse que vous avancez me donne la sensation d'être totalement perdu dans l'espace, d'un point de vue physique aussi bien qu'informationnel. »

languages.text: "Çünkü ortaya attığınız hipotez, bende hem fiziksel hem de bilgisel anlamda uzayda kaybolmuşluk hissiyatı uyandırdı."
languages.original_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

traits.locale_text: "Çünkü ortaya attığınız hipotez, bende hem fiziksel hem de bilgisel anlamda uzayda kaybolmuşluk hissiyatı uyandırdı."

languages.text: «Porque la hipótesis que propone me causa la sensación de estar totalmente perdido en el espacio, tanto en el sentido físico como en el informativo».
languages.original_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

traits.locale_text: «Porque la hipótesis que propone me causa la sensación de estar totalmente perdido en el espacio, tanto en el sentido físico como en el informativo».

languages.text: "Weil die von Euch vorgetragene Hypothese in mir das Gefühl weckt, körperlich wie informatorisch im Raum verloren zu sein."
languages.original_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

traits.locale_text: "Weil die von Euch vorgetragene Hypothese in mir das Gefühl weckt, körperlich wie informatorisch im Raum verloren zu sein."

languages.text: あなたが提案している仮説は、私を物理的にも情報的にも完全に宇宙に迷い込んだ感覚にさせます。
languages.original_text: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."

traits.locale_text: あなたが提案している仮説は、私を物理的にも情報的にも完全に宇宙に迷い込んだ感覚にさせます。
